creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
Created attachment 246039
[patch] explicity specify ncurses libs, disable idn if IDN is off (v3)

(In reply to John Hein from comment #2)

v3: same as v2, except:
 - only need to link with -lncurses (-ltinfo not needed)
 - remove old NCURSES option from OPTIONS_DEFAULT (NCURSES option removed years ago)
 - remove old SCREEN_DESC, no longer used (removed years ago)


Maintainer timeout.

The build still fails as reported originally.
